remarks: A rare opportunity in the heart of Westport's coveted Saugatuck section. Set on 1.10 dry acres w/ beautiful views overlooking the Saugatuck River, this property known historically as Twin Hickory's offers a unique blend of history, charm, & future potential. Rich in character & dating back more than a century, the property traces its roots to the Franklin M. Raymond estate. Orig constructed as a barn in the late 1800s & thoughtfully converted into a residence in the 1930s, the home & accompanying barn remain a fascinating piece of Westport's architectural history. The existing residence offers approximately 3,345 sq ft of living space w/ 5 bdrms, 3.5 ba. Filled w/ warmth & character, the home presents endless possibilities for restoration, renovation, or reimagining. Set back from the road & accessed from both Riverside Ave & Cherry Ln, the property enjoys an exceptional setting just minutes from downtown Westport, the train station, award winning schools, parks, restaurants, shopping, & major highways. Builders & developers take notice. With half acre zoning, no wetlands, dual street frontage, beautiful river views, & a prime location, this property offers exceptional redevelopment potential & a rare opportunity to create something truly special. Whether your vision is to preserve a piece of Westport history, renovate an architecturally significant home, or build a custom dream residence, opportunities of this caliber & flexibility are increasingly rare.
